title: Tri-Boomerang
description: Choose [blue]3[/blue] Attacks in your [gold]Deck[/gold]. [gold]Enchant[/gold] them with [purple]Instinct[/purple].
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: When obtained, prompts you to select 3 Attack cards from your deck and enchants them with Instinct.
